externalCommands.label: Gemini: Review code
externalCommands.command: gemini -p "Review this code for bugs, security issues, and design system violations against DESIGN.md. Be specific: name the file, the line, what's wrong, and what to fix. Format as a numbered list." .

externalCommands.label: Gemini: Second opinion on architecture
externalCommands.command: gemini -p "You are a senior architect reviewing this Go codebase. Evaluate the package boundaries, interface design, and error handling. Focus on: (1) does the provider interface in internal/provider/ match the substrate adapter contract from discovery/design/SYSTEM.md? (2) Are error types structured per the error taxonomy? (3) Any circular dependencies? Be direct. Name specific files and functions." .

externalCommands.label: Gemini: UI design review
externalCommands.command: gemini -p "Review this React/UI code against the design system in DESIGN.md. Check: typography (Instrument Serif for display, Geist Sans for body, Berkeley Mono for code), colors (#0A0A0B bg, #C8956C accent, warm grays), spacing (4px base), border-radius scale, motion patterns. Flag every violation. Be specific with file:line references." .

externalCommands.label: Mesh: Build & Test
externalCommands.command: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && go build ./cmd/mesh/ && go test ./...
